headlines: Bitcoin slips to mid-$60Ks after worst Q1 since 2018
Huge Bitcoin & Ethereum options expiry raises volatility risks
Wormhole (W) token: massive token unlock set for April 3
CLARITY Act: Senate markup eyed for late April as yield text nears deal

Tether hires KPMG for first full USDT financial audit (big stablecoin news)​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​

articles.title: Bitcoin price drops; Q1 2026 was the worst quarter since 2018
articles.summary: Bitcoin fell back into the mid‑$60,000s as macro and geopolitical risk pushed traders risk‑off. The asset posted its worst first quarter since 2018, keeping pressure on crypto markets and leading funds to re‑assess positions.

articles.title: Large Bitcoin & Ethereum options expiry today raises volatility risk
articles.summary: More than a billion dollars of BTC and ETH options settled on April 3, creating extra short‑term volatility and raising the chance of sudden price moves as market makers hedge positions.

articles.title: Wormhole (W) faces a major token unlock on April 3
articles.summary: Wormhole is set for a large vesting/cliff release on April 3 that will add hundreds of millions–over a billion–W tokens into circulation. Traders expect extra sell pressure and high volatility for W and related cross‑chain tokens.

articles.title: U.S. crypto bill (CLARITY Act) moves toward April Senate markup
articles.summary: Senate negotiators say an in‑principle deal on stablecoin yield language is close and are targeting a Banking Committee markup in late April — a key step for U.S. crypto market‑structure and stablecoin rules.

articles.title: Tether hires KPMG for first full financial audit of USDT reserves
articles.summary: Tether has engaged a Big Four auditor (reported as KPMG) to perform its first full financial statement audit of USDT reserves, a major transparency step for the largest stablecoin and a potential catalyst for institutional trust.
articles.source: Financial Times / Bloomberg Law; The Block

articles.title: Ripple launches on‑chain Treasury Management System for corporate treasuries
articles.summary: Ripple rolled out a Treasury Management System that natively integrates XRP and RLUSD for corporate cash and on‑chain liquidity management — a push to bring corporate treasury workflows on‑chain.

articles.title: Customer deposits at South Korea’s top exchanges fall sharply
articles.summary: Upbit and Bithumb reported big year‑on‑year drops in customer deposits (about ₩2.5 trillion combined), signaling capital shifting from crypto exchanges into Korean equities and other assets.

articles.title: Spot Bitcoin & Ethereum ETFs see early April outflows
articles.summary: U.S. spot crypto ETFs recorded net outflows at the start of April, continuing the choppy flows that have influenced BTC and ETH price sentiment and liquidity in recent weeks.
